name: Yordy's School Bus
principals: Yordy School Bus Inc. (FL corporation); related entity Yordy Transport Corp registered agent Reyes Garcia, Yordany
districts_or_customers: Likely Miami-Dade County / Opa-Locka area schools; no district contract publicly confirmed
recent_news: No M&A or material news found; entity remains listed in FL Sunbiz and on Yellow Pages/local directories as a small Opa-Locka school bus operator.
fit_notes: Too small to be a meaningful Summit tuck-in (estimated 1-2 buses, ~$89K revenue). At best a micro-acqui-hire for local route density in Miami-Dade if Summit ever wanted to consolidate single-bus owner-operators; otherwise not a fit.

name: Yusimi's School Bus
districts_or_customers: Miami-Dade area; intrastate carrier (within 100 miles); no school district contract publicly confirmed
recent_news: Active FMCSA carrier/broker (USDOT 2144176) registered April 2011; no M&A or recent news. Phone (786) 541-3411.
fit_notes: Sub-scale owner-operator (2 buses / 2 employees, ~$89K revenue). Not a viable Summit tuck-in target on its own; only relevant if rolled up with other Miami-Dade single-bus operators.

name: E & M School Trnsprtn Svc
districts_or_customers: Naples / Collier County area; possibly private schools or supplemental routes; no public district contract confirmed
recent_news: ~12 years in business per Buzzfile; ~$75K annual revenue, ~2 employees. No M&A or recent news.
fit_notes: Micro-operator in Naples/Collier County. Too small to move the needle for Summit; could only matter as part of a broader SW Florida route-bolting strategy.

name: Elite Care Wheelchair Transit
districts_or_customers: Dallas-area NEMT / wheelchair transport; no school-district contract confirmed. Distinct from Elite Community Transportation (Garland) and Elite Care Transports (founded 2017 by Noah Nuru & Mustefa Humed) which are separate Dallas-area entities.
recent_news: No M&A or material news found; minimal web footprint at the 5859 Frankford Rd #205 address.
fit_notes: Pure NEMT/wheelchair operator with no confirmed school-bus or SPED contract activity. Not a fit for Summit's school-bus tuck-in thesis; would only be relevant if Summit pursued a SPED/NEMT adjacency, and even then the scale (~$323K revenue) is sub-threshold.

name: Safe Wheelchair Transport
districts_or_customers: Dallas-area NEMT/wheelchair transport; no school-district or SPED contract publicly confirmed. Operates from a residential-style address (12517 Burninglog Ln).
recent_news: No M&A or material news; no website found; minimal public footprint. Founded 2022 per source data.
fit_notes: Recent-vintage (2022) NEMT-style wheelchair operator with no confirmed school contract. Not a fit for Summit's school-bus thesis. Owner-operated and likely too young/small to interest a platform; potential adjacency play only if Summit moves into SPED/NEMT.
